---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
  /* ── Reset & base ── */
  .contact-wrap * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  .contact-wrap {
    font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;
    min-height: 80vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 60px 24px;
    background: transparent;
  }

  .contact-card {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 980px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
    gap: 0;
    border: 1px solid #d9cfc4;
    background: #faf8f5;
    box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px #c8bfb0;
  }

  /* ── Left panel ── */
  .contact-left {
    background: #2c3e50;
    color: #f0ebe3;
    padding: 52px 40px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .contact-left::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -60px;
    right: -60px;
    width: 180px;
    height: 180px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(212, 175, 100, 0.08);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .contact-eyebrow {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #d4af64;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }

  .contact-headline {
    font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;
    font-size: 2.6rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.15;
    color: #f0ebe3;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .contact-headline em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: #d4af64;
  }

  .contact-subtext {
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: #9e968a;
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  /* Social icons */
  .social-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 2.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #5a534a;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }

  .social-icons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
  }

  .social-icons a {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border: 1px solid #3a332a;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: #9e968a;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.25s ease;
    position: relative;
  }

  .social-icons a:hover {
    border-color: #d4af64;
    color: #d4af64;
    background: rgba(212, 175, 100, 0.08);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .social-icons svg {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    fill: currentColor;
  }

  /* ── Right panel / form ── */
  .contact-right {
    padding: 52px 44px;
    background: #faf8f5;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .form-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }

  .form-group {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 7px;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }

  .form-group label {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #7a6e62;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .form-group input,
  .form-group textarea {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid #ddd6cc;
    border-radius: 0;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: #2a2520;
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
    width: 100%;
    resize: none;
  }

  .form-group input:focus,
  .form-group textarea:focus {
    border-color: #d4af64;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(212, 175, 100, 0.12);
  }

  .form-group textarea {
    height: 240px;
  }

  .submit-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 14px;
    background: #2c3e50;
    color: #f0ebe3;
    border: none;
    font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 2.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.25s ease;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .submit-btn:hover {
    background: #d4af64;
    color: #1c1917;
  }

  .submit-btn:active {
    transform: scale(0.99);
  }

  /* Success message */
  .success-msg {
    display: none;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px;
    color: #5a7a5a;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    border: 1px solid #b8d4b8;
    background: #f0f8f0;
    margin-top: 14px;
  }

  /* ── Responsive ── */
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .contact-card {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px #c8bfb0;
    }
    .contact-left {
      padding: 40px 30px;
    }
    .contact-right {
      padding: 36px 30px;
    }
    .form-row {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .contact-headline {
      font-size: 2rem;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="contact-wrap">
  <div class="contact-card">

    <!-- Left panel -->
    <div class="contact-left">
      <div>
        <h1 class="contact-headline">Get in<br><em>touch</em><br>with me!</h1>
        <p class="contact-subtext">
          Whether you have a question, want to collaborate, or just want to say hello — I'd love to hear from you.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="social-label">Find me here</div>
        <div class="social-icons">

          <!-- LinkedIn -->
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/graceeevans5/" target="_blank" title="LinkedIn" aria-label="LinkedIn">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433a2.062 2.062 0 01-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 112.063 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/>
            </svg>
          </a>

          <!-- Instagram -->
          <a href="https://www.instagram.com/grace3vans/" target="_blank" title="Instagram" aria-label="Instagram">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zM12 0C8.741 0 8.333.014 7.053.072 2.695.272.273 2.69.073 7.052.014 8.333 0 8.741 0 12c0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98C8.333 23.986 8.741 24 12 24c3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98C15.668.014 15.259 0 12 0zm0 5.838a6.162 6.162 0 100 12.324 6.162 6.162 0 000-12.324zM12 16a4 4 0 110-8 4 4 0 010 8zm6.406-11.845a1.44 1.44 0 100 2.881 1.44 1.44 0 000-2.881z"/>
            </svg>
          </a>

          <!-- Email -->
          <a href="mailto:graceeevans05@gmail.com" title="Email" aria-label="Email">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/>
            </svg>
          </a>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Right panel / form -->
    <div class="contact-right">
      <form
        action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR-FORM-ID"
        method="POST"
        id="contact-form"
        onsubmit="handleSubmit(event)"
      >
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="name">Name</label>
            <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Jane Smith" required />
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label for="email">Email</label>
            <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="jane@email.com" required />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label for="message">Message</label>
          <textarea id="message" name="message" placeholder="What's on your mind?" required></textarea>
        </div>

        <button type="submit" class="submit-btn">Send Message</button>

        <div class="success-msg" id="success-msg">
          ✓ &nbsp; Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<script>
  async function handleSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const form = document.getElementById('contact-form');
    const btn = form.querySelector('.submit-btn');
    const successMsg = document.getElementById('success-msg');

    btn.textContent = 'Sending...';
    btn.disabled = true;

    try {
      const response = await fetch(form.action, {
        method: 'POST',
        body: new FormData(form),
        headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        form.reset();
        successMsg.style.display = 'block';
        btn.textContent = 'Sent ✓';
      } else {
        btn.textContent = 'Error — try again';
        btn.disabled = false;
      }
    } catch {
      btn.textContent = 'Error — try again';
      btn.disabled = false;
    }
  }
</script>
```
